total_restore.title: Total Restore
total_restore.summary: The Original Seed locks into place. The Astraeus stabilizes, but the post-crash citizens are removed from active memory.
total_restore.felix_line: Felix: The fans are steady. I just wish I could hear the village.

patch.title: The Patch
patch.summary: The Diagnostic Lens filters the restore. The Husk repairs itself while Felix, the Weaver, Unit 01, and the dragons become recognized citizens.
patch.felix_line: Felix: No more false sky, Skye. Just a world that finally knows what it is.

hardware_override.title: Hardware Override
hardware_override.summary: The Kernel Blade shatters the drive. The Mirror Admin goes silent, Thread still falls, and the glitched world chooses its own unstable freedom.
hardware_override.felix_line: Felix: That was not in the manual. Which is probably why it worked.
